topic: How to integrate the caura-memclaw (008) memory-hardening proposal into the Spec Kit system: concrete integration surfaces, sequencing, and impact on existing skills / commands / agents / hooks. UX and AUTOMATION are the TOP design priorities — prefer default-on automation and zero-friction UX over flags/manual steps.

orchestration.rationale: Executors run READ-ONLY analysis of the live project; orchestrator writes all artifacts (sidesteps Gate-3 executor-write block; compaction-safe).

integrationTarget.what: 008 sub-packet-proposals.md (new child 010 P1-P3 + amendments to 002-008 + the 008 feedback reframe)
integrationTarget.into: Spec Kit Memory system under .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/ + commands/{memory,speckit,doctor} + agents/ + hooks
